title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Rustomjee Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Rustomjee Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!
